description: A customer is traveling internationally and wants to put a travel notification on their credit card to avoid it being blocked.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and the card they will be using.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and their credit card account.

nodes.task_description: Collect the travel details: countries and dates of travel.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the travel itinerary.

nodes.task_description: Add the travel notification to the account in the fraud monitoring system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets the travel notice.
